creator: mike@urgle.com
text:
# usbconfig -d ugen0.3 dump_device_desc
ugen0.3: <SunplusIT Inc Integrated Camera> at usbus0, cfg=0 md=HOST spd=HIGH (480Mbps) pwr=ON (500mA)

  bLength = 0x0012 
  bDescriptorType = 0x0001 
  bcdUSB = 0x0200 
  bDeviceClass = 0x00ef  <Miscellaneous device>
  bDeviceSubClass = 0x0002 
  bDeviceProtocol = 0x0001 
  bMaxPacketSize0 = 0x0040 
  idVendor = 0x04f2 
  idProduct = 0xb5ab 
  bcdDevice = 0x0010 
  iManufacturer = 0x0001  <SunplusIT Inc>
  iProduct = 0x0002  <Integrated Camera>
  iSerialNumber = 0x0000  <no string>
  bNumConfigurations = 0x0001 

#




it does seem to work without my extra config - apologies for the noise, I must have missed something during the initial setup.
